income_band_inr.evidence: Customer: Uh, approx aap laga lo 20 LPA.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Ek kaam karo, mere ko na sab na WhatsApp pe details share kar do ek baar, kya kuch hai.

objections.quote: Acha, long term ka hai kya? Koi short term ka batao mere ko agar hai toh.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Agent: Ma'am aapko saal ka 2 lakh ka plan batake chalu... Customer: Theek hai, batao.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer asked for short term duration specifically.

primary_goal.evidence: Customer is looking for investment options.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Theek hai, batao. (Implies sole decision making)

agent_promises: 36% income from first year for whole life

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer specifically requested a 5-year term, while the pitched product was a 12-year term.
missed_opportunities: Did not verify if the customer has existing life insurance coverage.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is actively interested in a short-term investment product and requested details via WhatsApp.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced an HDFC Life saving plan with a 36% income promise, and the customer responded with 'Bataiye'.
call_narrative.customer_response: Engaged and inquisitive, specifically steering the conversation toward short-term investment options.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer rejected the 12-year plan and insisted on a maximum 5-year duration.
call_narrative.ending: Agent agreed to check and send details for a 5-year plan via WhatsApp.

key_quotes: Koi short term ka batao mere ko agar hai toh.
Ek kaam karo, mere ko na sab na WhatsApp pe details share kar do ek baar, kya kuch hai.
Koi bhi ho, minimum 5 years hona chahiye. Maximum 5 years, minimum and maximum.
red_flags: Agent promised 36% income from first year.
